title: Letter to the Prime Minister on improving the nation’s health through primary prevention
body: "In May 2025, the Council for Science and Technology (CST) provided advice to the Prime Minister on improving the nation’s health through primary prevention. CST recommended action in three key areas:   Demonstrate leadership by implementing bold interventions to tackle smoking, alcohol consumption, outdoor air pollution and obesity. Prioritise childhood health to promote the nation’s overall wellbeing and future prosperity. Scope and deliver a modern, personalised disease prevention service.   "
